title: EVA Persona
description: An actor (human role or machine agent) that interacts with EVA

type.description: human = Entra ID user; machine = service principal or API key

services.description: Service ids this persona interacts with

feature_flags.description: Feature flag ids this persona is allowed to access

entra_group.description: Entra ID group name or null for machine

rank.description: Priority rank for persona ordering in UI and precedence decisions (lower = higher priority, default 99)

supersedes.description: Persona ids that this persona replaces or supersedes
